description: Standard ATAM session skeleton with the canonical quality attributes and starter scenarios.
systemContext: Summarize the system under evaluation in 2–4 sentences: what it does, who uses it, the main external interfaces, and the architectural style.
businessDrivers: Grow to 10x current traffic without raising on-call burden.
Meet regulatory requirements for audit and data retention.
Keep cloud cost inside the approved envelope.
constraints: Must run in existing Kubernetes clusters.
Primary datastore is Postgres; changes are expensive.
assumptions: Traffic grows linearly over the planning horizon.

approaches.name: Horizontal scaling of stateless services
approaches.description: Scale out behind a load balancer.

utilityTree.name: Performance
utilityTree.description: Throughput and latency under peak load

scenarios.stimulus: submits a standard query at peak hours

findings.description: Database connection pool size is sensitive for both performance and availability.
